mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msg_messages (room_id, sender_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.content, m.created_at, u.nickname AS sender_nickname, u.avatar_color FROM msg_messages m JOIN msg_users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.content, m.created_at, u.nickname AS sender_nickname, u.avatar_color FROM msg_messages m JOIN msg_users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
